name: GET_ROOM_KEY_FROM_ENTITY
comment: Gets the room hash key from the room that the specified entity is in. Each room in every interior has a unique key. Returns 0 if the entity is outside.
lua:
-- 0x076E46E0EB52AFC6 · build 1207
local entity = 0
local result = GetRoomKeyFromEntity(entity)

local z = 0.0

name: UNPIN_INTERIOR
comment:
Does something similar to INTERIOR::DISABLE_INTERIOR.

You don't fall through the floor but everything is invisible inside and looks the same as when INTERIOR::DISABLE_INTERIOR is used. Peds behaves normally inside.
lua:
-- 0x07FD1A0B814F6055 · build 1207
local interior = 0
UnpinInterior(interior)
